reviews.comment:
El ACA de ingeniero Maschwitz es un referente donde encontrás todos los servicicos prooios de automovil club. Me gustaría que la cinfiteria ofreciera mayor variedad de comidas al mediodia, pero solo encintrás sandwichs, y galletitas. Los desayunos en cambio te ofrecen medialunas de buena calidad aunque le faltan acompañamientos por ejemplos mermeladas  o manteca para que sea un desayun, a mk entender, reckmendable. No obstante  tjene un excelente lugar al aire libre para disfrutar dias calidos. Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) in Ingeniero Maschwitz is a landmark where you can find all the services typical of the Automobile Club. I wish the confectionery shop offered a wider variety of lunch options, but you only find sandwiches and cookies. Breakfast, on the other hand, offers good quality croissants, although they lack accompaniments like jam or butter to make it, in my opinion, a truly recommendable breakfast. However, it has an excellent outdoor area to enjoy warm days. Recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3ejl5RG13RRAB
